# Arcadeum — Free Online Board Games

> Play free online board games with friends. Battleship, strategy, and card games — create a room, share the link, and play in your browser.

Arcadeum is a browser-based multiplayer platform for classic board games. No download, no signup required.

## What is Arcadeum?

Arcadeum lets you play board games online with friends or AI opponents. Each game runs in your browser — just create a room and share the link.

### Supported Games

- **Sea Battle (Battleship)** — Classic naval combat strategy game. Place your ships, guess your opponent's coordinates, and sink their fleet before they sink yours.
- **Critical** — A strategic card game where you draw cards, defuse threats, and survive the explosion. 2–5 players with AI bots and themed decks.
- **Glimworm** — A real-time glow-worm snake arena for up to 10 players. Slither, survive, and eat the lights.
- **Tic-Tac-Toe** — Six themed variants with 2–4 players, optional teams, and boards from 3×3 to 9×9.
- **Cascade** — A shedding card game with Draw-Two and Wild +4 stacking chains. 2–10 players with four selectable themes.

### How to Play

1. Go to https://arcadeum.games
2. Pick a game
3. Create a room (or join one)
4. Share the room link with friends
5. Play in your browser — no install needed

### Features

- **Private Rooms** — Create a room, get a shareable link, and play with friends anywhere.
- **AI Bots** — Practice solo against computer opponents.
- **Real-time Chat** — Talk to your friends while you play.
- **Player Profiles** — Track your stats, wins, and game history.
- **Leaderboards** — Climb the rankings and compete with friends.
- **Daily Rewards** — Log in daily to earn coins and cosmetics.
- **Cosmetic Shop** — Unlock avatars, badges, and color tags to personalize your profile.
- **Multi-language** — Available in English, Spanish, French, Russian, and Belarusian.

### Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js (React), Tailwind CSS, Tamagui
- **Backend**: NestJS, MongoDB, Socket.IO
- **Mobile**: React Native / Expo
- **Monorepo**: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo

### Links

- [Home](https://arcadeum.games/en): Landing page with featured games and overview
- [Games](https://arcadeum.games/en/games): Browse all games and join rooms
- [Sea Battle](https://arcadeum.games/en/games/sea-battle): Classic Battleship strategy game
- [Critical](https://arcadeum.games/en/games/critical): Strategic card game — draw, defuse, survive
- [Tic-Tac-Toe](https://arcadeum.games/en/games/tic-tac-toe): Six themed variants, 2–5 players
- [Cascade](https://arcadeum.games/en/games/cascade): Shedding card game with stacking chains
- [Blog](https://arcadeum.games/en/blog): Guides, tutorials, and news
- [Community](https://arcadeum.games/en/community): Join the Arcadeum community
- [Leaderboards](https://arcadeum.games/en/leaderboards): Top players and rankings
- [Tournaments](https://arcadeum.games/en/tournaments): Competitive play schedules
- [Developers](https://arcadeum.games/en/developers): API and integration docs
- [Support](https://arcadeum.games/en/support): Help and contact info
- Discord: https://discord.gg/arcadeum
- Telegram: https://t.me/arcadeum
- GitHub: https://github.com/anomalyco/arcadeum

Arcadeum is open source and built with love by a small team. Contributions welcome!
